author: conductor
title: Sterling install update procedure for this machine (chulf, Windows)
summary: How to update the C:/Users/chulf/sterling-main install — it is a ZIP EXTRACTION, NOT a git repo; the repo of record is github.com/Chulf58/sterling (developed cross-machine, user cuj). Procedure: clone to scratch WITH -c core.autocrlf=false (post-clone config is too late for the checkout), copy tracked files over the install, restore the chulf backup path in CLAUDE.md project facts (repo carries cuj's), npm install + build + build:hooks + build:tui, sync-agents, regenerate stale init artifacts. Machine quirks: SYSTEM-level git core.autocrlf=true (Git-for-Windows default; global unset) breaks byte-comparing tests — neutralize BOTH $env:GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL and $env:GIT_CONFIG_SYSTEM to an empty file for test runs. Local state never in git: .sterling/, .claude/, .pipeline/, generated launchers. Captures the 2026-07-18 CLAUDE.md-touch session's durable value (board 8a9b3d9c) — that session performed the 80fa66c update; the pointed-to memory doc is the maintained source.
